session_conclusion.summary: transformer ESCALATED (weight-bound, tt-mlir #3370). text_encoder DIAGNOSED: shard spec correct; PCC failure isolated to sharded attention (M-RoPE + GQA repeat_kv SPMD mispropagation), MLP-only recovers 0.277->0.9637. text_encoder_2 + vae NOT run (need 1-chip host).
session_conclusion.open_item: RESUME HERE: text_encoder PCC drop. See diagnosis_text_encoder.json -> 3 options (escalate SPMD bug / ship MLP-only at 0.96 / move to p150 single-device). Diagnostic env-gate HUNYUAN_TE_MLP_ONLY left in loader (default off).
session_conclusion.working_tree: third_party/tt_forge_models/hunyuan_image_2_1/pytorch/loader.py has reversible env-gated diagnostic; default behavior unchanged.

transformer.summary: CONCLUDED. 3 TP iterations exhausted every fit-valid config on n300-llmbox (12 GiB/chip). (2,4) fp32 -> tt-mlir #3370 collective_permute not lowerable; (1,8) -> invalid, 28 attn heads %8 != 0; (1,4) bf16 -> compiled+ran then DRAM OOM (weights 8.73 GiB/chip leave ~2-3 GiB, a 771 MB ttnn.add tipped over). Inputs tiny ([1,64,2,2]) so OOM is weight-pressure, not reducible activations.
reasons: Weight-bound: 34.9 GiB bf16 / 4 chips = 8.73 GiB/chip; insufficient DRAM headroom for runtime buffers.
8-way (would fit at 4.36 GiB/chip) is INVALID: num_attention_heads=28 not divisible by 8.
2D FSDP (2,4) weight-sharding (would fit) is BLOCKED: tt-mlir #3370 (sdy.collective_permute not lowered).
Only head-valid degree fitting <=8 chips is 4, which is memory-insufficient.
transformer.unblock_on: tt-mlir #3370 (enables (2,4) 2D weight sharding -> ~4.4 GiB/chip). Alt experiment: 7-way mesh (1,7), head-valid + fits, but non-pow2 mesh topology unverified.

text_encoder.memory_fit: PASS — compiled + executed end-to-end, no OOM (fits cleanly at 4-way fp32)
text_encoder.root_cause: Shard spec is CORRECT (identical to known-good llama/qwen3). Catastrophic PCC from SHARDED ATTENTION: torch-xla/Shardy mispropagates head-sharded repeat_kv (expand+reshape, modeling_qwen2_5_vl.py:170) + M-RoPE split/cat (line 627). Bisect proof: replicating attention (MLP-only) recovers 0.277 -> 0.964.
options: escalate SPMD compiler bug (full attn TP)
ship MLP-only TP (0.96, needs ~0.026 numeric gap closed)
move to p150 single-device (fits, no TP)

text_encoder_2.note: compiles+executes; borderline numeric PCC gap (~0.0084 under bar)

vae.error: TT_FATAL Out of Memory: 32GiB DRAM buffer across 7 banks (activation blowup at 2048x2048 decode)
vae.candidate_fix: enable VAE tiling (tiled decode) to cap peak activation memory

text_encoder.note: fp32 weights fit p150 (no OOM). PCC gap confirms Qwen2.5-VL attention (M-RoPE+GQA) is a DEVICE op-level numeric issue, not a sharding bug (matches diagnosis_text_encoder.json residual_gap).

session_2026_06_06.host: dedicated single-chip Blackhole p100a -> p150 (n150 skipped: needs Wormhole); TT_VISIBLE_DEVICES=0
session_2026_06_06.summary: Ran all 3 single-device components on p150. None pass yet: vae OOM (activation), te2 + text_encoder borderline-numeric PCC. Fixes identified; paused before applying/verifying per user.

text_encoder_2.recommended_fix: op-level PCC bisect (runtime-failure-debugger) — T5/ByT5 device fp32 numeric gap (no q-scaling, large dynamic range). No obvious loader fix.

vae.status: single-shot 2048x2048 decode needs ~32GiB intermediate -> p150 DRAM overflow
vae.recommended_fix: enable VAE tiling (tiled_decode): load_vae() -> vae.enable_tiling(tile_sample_min_size=512). Proposed, NOT applied (reverted; working tree clean). 512px tile -> 16x16 latent caps peak ~1/16; CPU golden + TT run same tiled module. Needs CPU sanity + TT re-run.

text_encoder.status: fp32 weights fit p150, no OOM; PCC 0.9527
text_encoder.key_finding: Single-device (replicated) PCC 0.9527 < TP MLP-only 0.9637 -> the Qwen2.5-VL attention (M-RoPE + GQA) PCC gap is a DEVICE op-level numeric issue, NOT a sharding bug. Confirms diagnosis_text_encoder.json residual_gap. Single-device does NOT rescue PCC.
text_encoder.recommended_fix: op-level PCC bisect (runtime-failure-debugger) on M-RoPE (apply_multimodal_rotary_pos_emb) + GQA repeat_kv; candidate: force fp32 accumulation / decompose M-RoPE split-cat.

working_tree_changes: none (vae tiling edit reverted per user; working tree clean)
resume_next: vae: RE-APPLY enable_tiling(512) in load_vae (was reverted), CPU-sanity tiled decode (shape (1,3,2048,2048), finite), then TT re-run test_vae_decoder on p150; if tiled path fails to compile on TT, try tile=256 or opt_level adjust.
text_encoder_2 + text_encoder: invoke runtime-failure-debugger for op-level PCC bisect (heavy; needs tt_metal machine/repo/branch for Phase 5). Both are attention-numeric gaps.
Decision pending per component: ship at measured PCC w/ xfail vs close numeric gap.
